text:
Once upon a time in a lush, green forest, there was a magical garden where flowers of all colors bloomed and danced with the wind. At the heart of this garden stood a magnificent tree, its branches swaying gently under the warm sun.

One sunny morning, a little girl named Lily wandered into the garden. Her eyes sparkled with curiosity as she observed the vibrant life around her. She noticed a tiny butterfly, fluttering about, struggling to find its way. The butterfly's wings were torn and its flight seemed labored.

Lily approached the butterfly, her heart full of compassion. She carefully picked it up and gently placed it on one of the petals of the most beautiful flower in the garden—a crimson rose that seemed to glow with inner light. As soon as the butterfly landed on the rose, it began to heal, its wings mending themselves until they were as good as new.
